premium.premiumDescription: Get the full breakdown — dosing, forms, bioavailability, synergies, and interactions. Starting at $1.99 per dive.
premium.heroSubtitle: Evidence-grounded deep dives on every supplement — dosing protocols, bioavailability, interactions, and synergies. Every claim backed by cited sources.
premium.researchStandardBody: Every deep dive synthesises peer-reviewed literature into actionable protocols. We don't just aggregate — we trace every claim back to its source.
premium.testimonial: "Finally a supplement tool that cites actual studies instead of just repeating label claims."
premium.readyToDeeperBody: Payments launching soon — drop your interest below and we'll let you know first.

dive.label: Pay per Dive
dive.description: Perfect if you only need occasional lookups.

premiumFeatures: Evidence citations linked to PubMed studies
Confidence score weighted by study type
Dosage gap: studied dose vs. retail dose
Web + mobile access with one account

faq.a: Not for a single deep dive. For subscriptions you will need a free account so your access follows you across devices.

faq.q: Does it work on the mobile app too?
faq.a: Yes. One subscription unlocks both the web dashboard and the iOS/Android app. Mobile-specific perks (scan-to-deep-dive, push notifications) are rolling out shortly.

faq.q: What happens when my subscription expires?
faq.a: You drop back to the free tier instantly. Your account and history are preserved — you can resubscribe any time.
Within 7 days of purchase, yes. Email us and we will sort it.

premiumDeepDive.searchingPubMed: Searching PubMed database · Grounding answer in studies
premiumDeepDive.confidenceWeighting: Weighted by study type: meta-analysis (100%) → RCT — Randomized Controlled Trial (80%) → observational (40%) → animal (10%)
premiumDeepDive.catchIntro: Limitations identified in the available evidence:
premiumDeepDive.askEvidenceSubtitle: Ask a specific question — answered using only the retrieved PubMed studies.
premiumDeepDive.disclaimer: Answers are grounded in retrieved PubMed abstracts and do not constitute medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional before changing your supplement regimen.

recommendations.footerNote: Evidence-ranked · Updated 2025 · Click any card to deep dive

sleep.label: Better Sleep
sleep.intro: Good sleep is the foundation of every other health goal. Before stacking supplements, address the basics: consistent wake time, a dark cool room, and no screens 30 minutes before bed.

muscle.label: Build Muscle
muscle.intro: Supplements accelerate gains — but only on a foundation of adequate protein (1.6–2.2 g/kg), progressive overload, and 7–9 h sleep. Get those right first.

health.label: General Health
health.intro: A short, evidence-led list covers most nutritional gaps from a modern diet. Whole foods come first — but these fill in what diet alone commonly misses, especially at northern latitudes.

energy.label: Energy & Focus
energy.intro: Low energy is almost always a lifestyle problem first — poor sleep, chronic stress, or nutrient deficiency. Fix those root causes before adding stimulants.

cognition.label: Brain & Cognition
cognition.intro: Sleep is the number-one nootropic. Aerobic exercise (BDNF) and stress management come next. Supplements then optimize on top of that foundation.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie Consent
cookieBanner.body: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze usage. Essential cookies are required for basic functionality.
cookieBanner.noDataSold: We don't sell or share personal data.
cookieBanner.preferencesBody: We use different types of cookies to optimize your experience:
cookieBanner.essentialCookiesDesc: Required for basic site functionality and security.
cookieBanner.analyticsCookiesDesc: Help us understand how you use our site to improve performance.

supplementRecommendations.title: Supplement Recommendations
supplementRecommendations.subtitle: Select your primary health goal to get personalized supplement suggestions
proTipsList: Start with Priority 1 supplements first, add others gradually
Take supplements consistently for at least 4–6 weeks to see benefits
Buy from reputable brands with third-party testing
Consider getting blood tests to check for deficiencies
Quality matters more than quantity — invest in better forms when possible

ingredientQuality.title: Ingredient Quality Analysis
ingredientQuality.subtitle: Compare supplement forms to make informed purchasing decisions
ingredientQuality.noDataBody: Add supplement products with URLs to see ingredient quality analysis
ingredientQuality.noIngredientsFoundBody: Products in this category don't have extractable ingredient data. Check console logs for debugging information.
ingredientQuality.qualityGapSameScore: Both options have identical quality scores — choose based on preference
ingredientQuality.qualityGapClose: Both options are high quality with minimal difference in effectiveness
ingredientQuality.qualityGapSignificant: This represents a significant difference in bioavailability and effectiveness
ingredientQuality.multiIngredientFormula: Multi-ingredient formula · Select an ingredient to analyze
